disallowed_items.reason: Fuel Surcharges are listed under Items Not Permissible for contents/pack-out billing
Forklift Operator is listed under Items Not Permissible for contents/pack-out billing

disallowed_items.description: "Evaluate pack & inventory" line items not permissible
disallowed_items.reason: "Evaluate pack & inventory" line items are not permissible - this includes all iterations of the CPS BX*** Xactimate code

disallowed_items.description: FCW ACCL not permissible when replacing wood flooring
disallowed_items.reason: Do not include line item FCW ACCL when replacing wood flooring. The replacement line item allows for drop off, unboxing and acclimation time

disallowed_items.description: Storage billed in cubic feet not permissible
disallowed_items.reason: Storage is calculated on a square foot basis. Charging for storage in cubic feet is not permissible

quantity_limits.description: Waste for carpet and vinyl: 15% maximum
quantity_limits.reason: Waste is built into the Xactimate unit cost for all flooring line items except carpet and sheet vinyl. All carpet and vinyl replacement estimates should be calculated applying 15% waste. Use of Xactimate Carpet and Vinyl Flooring Wizard is not permissible

quantity_limits.description: Scaffolding only if platform exceeds 20 feet
quantity_limits.reason: Paul Davis will have and use standard ladders, jacks, and plank scaffolding as part of their normal equipment toolset, and as such, the labor yield assumption addresses the average time necessary for normal one or two-story applications, including the set up and use of this equipment as needed, where the ladder scaffold platform does not exceed 20'

overhead_profit_restrictions.description: O&P allowable on all trades except mitigation, with adjuster pre-approval
overhead_profit_restrictions.reason: Overhead and Profit is allowable on all trades (except mitigation) with adjuster pre-approval and solid documentation/support in the file notes

f9_note_requirements.description: Line-item note required for additional labor hours
f9_note_requirements.reason: Labor cost is included in most line-item cost in Xactimate. Labor hours to supplement line-item cost are not permissible. If there is an exception that renders the unit cost in Xactimate ineffective, the additional labor cost must be supported with photos and documentation in XactAnalysis Notes; including a line item Xactimate note
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Explain why Xactimate unit cost is ineffective and why additional labor is needed
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Additional labor required due to [specific condition]. Xactimate line item does not account for [explain situation]. See photos for documentation.

f9_note_requirements.description: Line-item note required when detaching/resetting undamaged plumbing
f9_note_requirements.reason: Plumbing components (supply lines, p-traps, fixtures, etc.) are typically reusable and may not require resetting when undamaged by the covered peril. Allowance to replace or detach/reset undamaged components should be documented (photos and line-item note) when not evident by the repair methodology
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Explain why undamaged component needs to be detached/reset or replaced
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Undamaged plumbing component requires detach/reset due to [reason - e.g., access for repairs, age/condition makes reuse not feasible]. See photos.

f9_note_requirements.description: Line-item note required for temporary repair methods
f9_note_requirements.reason: Photos and line-item notes should clearly support methods employed for temporary repairs
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Document the temporary repair method and materials used
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Temporary repair using [method/materials] to prevent further damage until permanent repairs can be completed. See photos.

f9_note_requirements.description: Line-item note required for mitigation equipment setup costs
f9_note_requirements.reason: Cost for the initial set up is permissible; based on amount of equipment needed and should be documented with line-item notes
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Document the type and amount of equipment set up
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Initial setup for [number] dehumidifiers, [number] air movers, and [other equipment] to dry affected areas. See equipment log.

f9_note_requirements.description: Documentation required when replacing only carpet pad
f9_note_requirements.reason: If Paul Davis is replacing carpet pad when only the carpet is damaged (no damage to existing carpet pad), they should support the recommendation in XactAnalysis Notes: how old is the carpet and pad, is this a high traffic area, and if the carpet only is replaced, is there a reasonable uniform appearance
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Age of carpet/pad, whether it's a high-traffic area, and whether replacing carpet only still achieves a reasonable uniform appearance
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Carpet pad replacement recommended. Carpet is [age] years old in high-traffic area. Replacing only carpet without pad would result in non-uniform appearance due to [reason].

f9_note_requirements.description: F9 note required when RFG HIGH is not used as a separate line item
f9_note_requirements.reason: If a separate line item is not utilized for RFG HIGH, please add an F9 note to indicate the reason why
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Explain why the 2-story/high roof charge was not itemized separately
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: RFG HIGH not itemized separately because [reason]. See photos.

f9_note_requirements.description: F9 note and rental invoice required for cargo/moving van rental
f9_note_requirements.reason: Cargo Vans and/or Moving Vans are not permissible unless a F9 note indicates a rental was needed and a rental invoice is uploaded. The vehicle or truck rental (CPS-TR series) must be rented for a specific claim
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Explain why a cargo/moving van rental was needed for this specific claim
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Cargo/moving van rental required for [reason]. Rental invoice uploaded to XactAnalysis.

f9_note_requirements.description: Adjuster approval required for heavy cleaning or high-density line items
f9_note_requirements.reason: Heavy cleaning or high-density line items require adjuster approval, to assess restoration cost-effectiveness
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Confirm adjuster approval was obtained for this heavy cleaning/high-density charge
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Heavy cleaning/high-density charge approved by adjuster [name] on [date] for [reason]. See photos.

f9_note_requirements.description: Adjuster approval required for hazardous cleaning codes
f9_note_requirements.reason: Hazardous cleaning codes require adjuster approval
f9_note_requirements.required_info: Confirm adjuster approval was obtained for this hazardous cleaning charge
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: Hazardous cleaning charge approved by adjuster [name] on [date] for [reason]. See photos.

f9_note_requirements.description: IICRC documentation required to support PPE charges
f9_note_requirements.reason: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) is no longer required on every job, however there are certain conditions that would require PPE for some estimating and repair personnel on premises. If PPE is required, IICRC documentation is necessary for approval
f9_note_requirements.required_info: IICRC documentation supporting the condition requiring PPE
f9_note_requirements.recommended_note: PPE required due to [condition]. IICRC documentation supporting this need is attached.

observations.description: Semi-gloss and high gloss trim should not be painted if undamaged
observations.reason: Semi-Gloss and High Gloss painted baseboards, door, window, and door trim, etc. should not be painted if not damaged
observations.recommendation: Review if undamaged trim is included in paint scope

observations.description: Check for natural break points in flooring
observations.reason: If a closing door (carpet only), or threshold separates the room or the run is not continuous into the next room, replacement of other undamaged areas should not be included
observations.recommendation: Verify flooring scope stops at natural break points (thresholds, closing doors)

observations.description: Sealant typically only for new drywall, new non-paint grade trim, stains, or areas to be textured
observations.reason: Sealant is typically applied for new drywall, new non-paint grade trim, stained areas, or areas to be textured. Use two coats of paint when painting trim and the material is pre-primed; use one coat of primer/sealant and one coat of paint if the material doesn't come pre-primed
observations.recommendation: Verify sealant is only applied where necessary (new drywall/trim, stains, or texture areas)

observations.description: Waste is built into most flooring items except carpet/vinyl
observations.reason: Waste is built into the Xactimate unit cost for all flooring line items except carpet and sheet vinyl
observations.recommendation: Verify waste is not added to flooring items other than carpet and vinyl

observations.description: CLN FINALR should only be used where there was unusual construction debris/dust
observations.reason: CLN FINALR is intended to remove excess dust and debris within a residential home upon completion of construction activities prior to move in. Ex. Construction dust created by sanding and refinishing hardwood floors, tear out of tile flooring, drywall repairs or re-blowing texture. Replacement of carpet or painting typically would not create dust
observations.recommendation: Verify this room has drywall/demo/texture/sanding/refinishing work generating unusual dust or debris before including CLN FINALR

item_pattern: tape joint for new to existing drywall
observations.description: DRY PATCHJ may duplicate taping already included in the base drywall line item
observations.reason: Xactimate's base drywall replacement line items (e.g. "1/2" drywall - hung, taped, ready for texture") already include taping in their own description. A separate DRY PATCHJ (tape joint) charge in the same room may be duplicate billing
observations.recommendation: Check whether the room's base drywall line item description already includes taping - if so, DRY PATCHJ is likely redundant
observations.guideline_reference: Xactimate line-item description (not a specific guideline page)

notes: Estimates should be supported by photos, XactAnalysis Notes, and line-item (F9) notes rather than relying on Xactimate default descriptions alone
Paul Davis must submit estimates with 94% or higher estimating accuracy as determined by the USAA Reinspection Team
Each situation (matching, repair vs. replace) should be considered based on its own merits and unique circumstances, including state specific standards
USAA references, adjuster contact info, and program details should never appear on the estimate itself - use XactAnalysis Notes instead
